title: Couch Server
description: Just a mod pack for friends. Improve gameplay and had a little spice.
body: A lightweight, community-focused modpack designed to enhance the overall Minecraft experience for friends. It keeps the core gameplay feeling familiar while adding quality-of-life improvements, performance boosts, and small tweaks that make survival more fun and cooperative. From smoother performance and better visuals to convenient tools for exploration, building, and teamwork — this pack is all about making your adventures together more enjoyable and seamless. Perfect for casual play, long-term worlds, and shared creativity.
